title: Ullathai Allitha
desc: Tired of his father's disciplinarian ways and to avoid marrying a girl chosen by the latter, Raja runs away to Ooty. There, he is hired as a driver by the man whose daughter he was supposed to marry.

title: Thambikku Entha Ooru
desc: Seeing Balu's spendthrift and carefree attitude, his father sends him to his friend's house in a village to get reformed. Things get complicated when he gets entangled in a love triangle.

title: Seevalaperi Pandi
desc: Five villagers, unhappy with the judgments of the chief of their village, join forces with his bodyguard Pandi to kill him. But Pandi gets capital punishment while the others are acquitted.
A few robbers are given a task by the police to steal money from gangsters. However, when the gangsters chase the robbers, they all end up in a haunted house.

title: Parambarai
desc: Paramasivan has a rocky relationship with his father following the tragic murder of his mother. To make matters more complicated, he falls in love with the daughter of a ruthless landlord.
